basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant, Principal Team Lead Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC), New Delhi
basic_details.post_name: Principal Team Lead – IT Division (Technical); Consultant – Certification Unit (QPS); Consultant – Drugs and Logistics (QPS); Consultant – Quality and Patient Safety; Consultant – Community Processes / CPHC; Consultant – Research and Innovation in Primary Care / CPHC; Consultant – AI and Digital Technology in Primary Health Care / CPHC
basic_details.short_information: NHSRC is recruiting multiple posts including Principal Team Lead (IT) and various Consultant positions, last date 16 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in IT / Computer Science / Electronics / B.Sc. IT / BCA along with M.Tech / M.Sc. in Computer Science / IT / Electronics / MCA / MBA in IT / Systems (2 Years Full time Degree) / Full-time MBA (2 Years Full time Degree). Only Regular Full-time Degrees accepted.
qualification.experience: Minimum 15 Years of post-qualification experience in Software Development, IT Systems & networking.
qualification.details: The position reports to Advisor – Community Processes-Comprehensive Primary Healthcare (CP-CPHC) and is on contractual basis. Initial contract for Two years, extendable based on performance.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Consultant – Research and Innovation in Primary Care / CPHC
Consultant – AI and Digital Technology in Primary Health Care / CPHC

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Consultant – AI and Digital Technology in Primary Health Care / CPHC

salary_details.remuneration: Starting from ₹3,00,000/- per month; may be fixed higher based on experience and suitability
salary_details.other benefits: Dedicated sedan car facility, free accidental insurance, subsidized medical insurance, mobile bill reimbursement, laptop reimbursement (as per NHSRC Policy), 30 days consolidated leave, fully paid maternity leave for female consultants as per GoI policy, annual increments, TA/DA and per diem for official tours
salary_details.work location: New Delhi; Travel to States and Districts involved
salary_details.duration of contract: Initial Contract till 31st March 2028 (with further extension subject to satisfactory performance and extension of NHM)

selection_process: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Incumbent is expected to have excellent writing skills and language proficiency
for which a screening test may be administered.
Written Test Condition: If the recruitment process includes a written test
a ratio of 1:5 will be adopted — for 1 vacancy
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online; no other mode of application will be accepted. Applications will be accepted in the prescribed online application format only available on the NHSRC website. Candidates should have a valid email ID and mobile number which should be kept active till declaration of results. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last date.

For queries: Contact 011-26108982/83/84/92/93 (for Principal Team Lead – IT, between 09:00 AM to 05:30 PM on all working days) or 011-26108983/84 (for all Consultant posts, between 9:30 AM and 5:30 PM) or by email at: [email protected]
important_instructions: All positions are contractual in nature; candidates will not be treated as employees of NHSRC and will not be entitled to benefits available to regular employees. NHSRC shall have no obligation to offer regular employment to selected candidates during and/or after the completion of the contract period. Fulfilling the eligibility criteria does not result in shortlisting for interview for Consultant posts. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview; a written test / screening test may also be conducted. For the Principal Team Lead (IT) post, Government Officials can also apply on Deputation subject to meeting TOR criteria and submission of NOC from their controlling department. All revisions / corrigendum (if any) will be hosted on the NHSRC website only; candidates should visit regularly. Candidates selected may be considered for other vacant positions at NHSRC requiring similar skill sets and at an appropriate level. All positions involve travel to States and Districts; candidates must be willing to undertake outstation travel. Contract for all positions is initially till 31st March 2028 with further extension subject to satisfactory performance. Legal jurisdiction for any dispute arising out of this recruitment shall be as per applicable law.
